<svg̈̊̂ xmlns="http://www.w3.ǫ̀rg/2000/svg" vieŵ́Box="0 0 800 600">

  <text x="400" y="300" tẽ́̊xt-anchor̂="middle" fî̧̧ll="ẘ̨̈hiẗ̂́e" font-ŝ̨́į̀zȩ̀̀="24">N̨ode 20+, TypeS̈cript 5.7+: modern stà̧ck̃, à̧̈ncient human mistakes.</text>
